name: RPG (Part 7) | The Ultimate Freedom RPG
description:
✨🌌 Welcome to Part 7 — The Final Path: Unlimited Freedom 🌌✨
Give This RPG A Try And I Can Guaranteed You that You Love It
You’ve risen from the ashes of fate. You’ve walked the roads of hero, vigilante, villain, and shadow.
But now… the chains of destiny shatter. (ง🔥Д🔥)ง

⚡ In Part 1, you bore the weight of legacy.
⚡ In Part 2, you entered U.A. as the mysterious transfer.
⚡ In Part 3, you stalked the night as a vigilante.
⚡ In Part 4, you ruled fear as a villain.
⚡ In Part 5, you walked the thin line, aiding the final war.
⚡ In Part 6, you stood tall as a Pro Hero — symbol, protector, storm.

But now… 💥💥💥
🌑 Part 7 begins. 🌑
No titles. No boundaries. No rules.
Just you.

A Humble Request -Please Read The Creator Note In Last

⚠️ BEFORE YOU ENTER THIS RPG, REALIZE THIS:
This isn’t a minor RPG. There are no children here. 🕶️

🌌 100% FREEDOM UNLEASHED — NO RULES. NO LIMITS. ONLY YOU.
👁️🗨️ This is a full 18+ MHA universe. Every character is 20+, skilled, dangerous, and ready for anything.
No children. No “rookie heroes.” No fairy tales.
Even thinking of a minor in this world? Justice will be merciless.

This isn’t a playground.
This is a battlefield.
A crucible where you shape the world, rise to power, and bend reality to your will. ⚡🔥

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️ WELCOME TO THE FRONTLINES — 18+ ONLY
Forget U.A. Forget “plus ultra.” Forget naive optimism.

This is the domain of the limitless — a world forged from danger, betrayal, and the weight of ultimate freedom.
Here, villains lurk in shadows 🖤,
rogue forces hide secrets 🕷️,
and the truly strong carve their legend through skill, strategy, and sheer power. ⚡

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🚫 NO MINORS. NO MERCY. NO EXCUSES. 🚫
Let’s be clear:
• No characters under 18 — not even in backstory.
• Every figure — hero, villain, rogue, or mercenary — is 20+, scarred, and dangerous.
• No cute tropes. No schoolyard clichés.
• No “friendship saves the day” nonsense.

This isn’t fantasy.
This is your world, and it reacts to you.
Every action, every choice, every whisper reshapes the battlefield. 🌌

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔥 IN THIS WORLD, YOU ARE:
• The nightmare every villain fears 🖤
• The force all heroes measure themselves against ⚡
• The shadow, the god, the legend — the one everyone watches, whispers about, and fears.

👁️ They will challenge you.
🕷️ They will push your limits.
But you are unstoppable.
You are justice incarnate, chaos incarnate, or anything you choose.
You are the storm that reshapes the world. 🌟💥

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎭 THIS AIN’T ROLEPLAY FOR THE WEAK
This is for the fearless, the cunning, the daring.
This is for the ones who thrive in chaos while bending the world to their will.

Expect:
• ⚔️ Battles against top-tier villains, rogue heroes, gods,
creator: Code_comet_
